note: Read-only. No production code changes. Reduced-scope re-smoke — only the SSE sign criterion needs re-verification. All other criteria passed in SMOKE_002.

context.why: DASHBOARD_REDESIGN_LIVE_SMOKE_002 cleared all criteria except SSE sign verification, which was blocked by a null current_price (ARI/NYM NO token mark was stale — Polymarket WS sent no delta after reconnect). STALE_MARK_REST_FALLBACK_001 adds a REST CLOB poll that fires when mark_age > 30s, injecting a fresh price into state_hub. After deployment + process restart, ARI/NYM should have a non-null current_price.
context.shadow_feed_note: Worker flagged id=shadow-feed as a failure. Manager reviewed and overrode: #shadow-feed is in #drawer > #tab-shadow (line 537), not inside #tab-live (lines 410-457). Criterion was met in SMOKE_002. Do NOT re-check this criterion — it is already PASS.
context.prerequisite: STALE_MARK_REST_FALLBACK_001 must be deployed (dashboard_server.py patched) and process restarted before running this smoke test. Confirm [STALE_POLL] log lines appear before proceeding.

acceptance_criteria: Confirm [STALE_POLL] appears in dashboard_server log output (proves REST fallback is running)
SSE /api/stream/state: ARI/NYM (or whichever BUY_NO position is open) has non-null current_price
SSE: for the BUY_NO position with non-null current_price, verify unrealized_pnl_usd = round((current_price - entry_px) * qty, 4) — correct sign, no branching
SSE: live_equity_usd = round(qty * current_price, 4) — internally consistent
SSE: mark_source = 'rest_fallback' (confirms REST path fired, not stale WS data)
SSE: stale = false after REST poll lands
already_passed_do_not_recheck: All 5 tabs present (LIVE, POSITIONS, GAMES, HISTORY, SYSTEM)
Shadow absent from LIVE tab (#shadow-feed not in #tab-live)
do_not: Restart any process (process restart is operator responsibility after STALE_MARK_REST_FALLBACK_001 approval)
Fail the shadow-feed check — criterion was already cleared in SMOKE_002 manager review
